svg.title: Poneglyph C4 context diagram
svg.desc: System context view. Senior consultants and field staff use Poneglyph to manage donor-funded development projects. Poneglyph reads project data from forms, transcripts, and CRM exports, calls the Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 API for reasoning, and produces briefings consumed by donors at the World Bank, GIZ, and UN.
svg.text: Used by mid-market consulting firms running World Bank / GIZ / UN-funded
